actions.intent: Open with a non-route clear despite the forecast-row race.
Spend another accepted action away from the lower route.
Keep chasing side value instead of the urgent puppy.
Delay the shortest lower path while water pressure tightens.
Touch the upper-safe route instead of securing the lower flood edge.
Use one more non-route action and let water flood the lower rescue path.

notes: Verified fail: attractive non-route clears lose the forecast-row race before the first rescue is secure.
